name: Azlund
epithet: of the House of Healing, whose oath bound the road

name: Tessa
epithet: who walked the company down to the docks where the Horizon was moored

name: Rindal
epithet: first mate of the Horizon, whose tour named the crew

name: Captain Brennan
epithet: veteran of the Nyanzaru run, who gave them a cloak of billowing for six ropes held

name: Pip
epithet: cook of the Horizon, who minded the cheese and would not be lied to

name: Corwin, called Artus Cimber
epithet: who hid his name in a glove and a ring, and turned alone to the pirates so the company might live

name: Dragonbait
epithet: saurial of many scents, who held the prow when the sahuagin came

name: Harlen
epithet: Zhentarim spy, the wrong sailor, the cheese-thief, knocked cold in the galley as the party was teleported away

name: The Fleeing Yuan-ti
epithet: who struck from the rooftops and fled before the reckoning

name: Torgg
epithet: officer of the ship's crew who dismissed a crewmate for incompetence and yielded the hiring manifest when Anton asked

name: Volo
epithet: the wandering chronicler met near the Temple of Savras, who sold the company his Guide to Monsters and bade them find a guide before the jungle

name: Lilac Mist
epithet: tabaxi dinosaur racer of Port Nyanzaru, whose wayward triceratops first brought her to the company's attention, and who finished the track ahead of them all

name: Kessra
epithet: nearly lost overboard when the storm struck, caught at the rail by Vex with Anton bracing him
